title: Buying Toys 买玩具
scene: 爸爸带儿子去玩具店买玩具。

lines.en: Dad, look at that robot! It can walk and talk!
lines.zh: 爸爸，看那个机器人！它会走路还会说话！

lines.en: That looks cool. How much is it?
The robot is one hundred and fifty yuan. It's very popular.
lines.zh: 机器人一百五十元。非常受欢迎。

lines.en: That's a bit expensive. Jack, didn't you say you wanted a puzzle?
lines.zh: 有点贵。杰克，你不是说想要拼图吗？

lines.en: Oh right! I also want a puzzle. Do you have animal puzzles?
lines.zh: 哦对了！我也想要拼图。你们有动物拼图吗？

lines.en: Yes! We have a beautiful panda puzzle. Five hundred pieces.
lines.zh: 有的！我们有一个很漂亮的熊猫拼图。五百片。

lines.en: That sounds fun! How much is the puzzle?
lines.zh: 听起来很有趣！拼图多少钱？

lines.en: The puzzle is only forty-five yuan. And it comes with glue.
lines.zh: 拼图只要四十五元。还送胶水。

lines.en: Great! Let's get the puzzle today. You can save for the robot.
lines.zh: 太好了！我们今天买拼图。你可以攒钱买机器人。

lines.en: OK, Dad! The puzzle is a good choice too. I love pandas!
lines.zh: 好的，爸爸！拼图也是好选择。我喜欢熊猫！
